title: Microsoft Purview Unified Catalog — data access policies
description: Desired state for a simplified, human-authorable projection of Unified Catalog role assignments: which built-in Purview data governance role a principal holds, scoped to a business domain (or tenant-wide for global roles). This is NOT a passthrough of the raw Policies Update ABAC decisionRules/attributeRules document. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/purview/purview-unified-catalog/policies/update (fetched 2026-07-08). Added per ADR 0047 §Decision item 5. No reconciler consumes this file yet; the grant/revoke-aware mapping to the live ABAC document is deferred to Deploy-UnifiedCatalogPolicies.ps1 per ADR 0047 §Decision item 9.

items.description: List of role assignments. Default state is the empty list.

domain.description: Business domain name scoping this role assignment. Required for domain-scoped roles; omit for tenant-wide Data Governance roles. Must match an entry in business-domains.yaml when present.

role.description: Built-in Purview data governance role, per the Policies — Update Learn page's enumerated role catalog.

principals.description: Entra group or user display names granted this role. Resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023 — never an inline object ID.

description.description: Short prose explaining why this assignment exists (audit context).

status.description: Authoring-only lifecycle marker. The live reconciler (item c) defines how it maps to the ABAC document.
